expertise.summary: Machine learning engineer with expertise in natural language processing and computer vision

responsibilities: Created track features and pipelines using Big Query and Airflow
Created tool that allowed music teams to curate playlists and select tracks from 300 million using SQL and Looker
Finetune LLMs on coding data, using Lo RA and 8 bit Quantization techniques on 3 3090 GPUs
Created Data for finetuning LLMs using self-instruct, LIMA and self chat papers
Developed a multimodal search system using CLIP’s semantic representation for image and text
Developed an information retrieval pipeline that parses technical documentation and created embeddings using Dense Passage Retrieval and Tf Idf
Implemented a callback wrapper for Py Torch, Tensor Flow, and Paddle Paddle
Pretrained BERT from scratch using Nvidea Ne Mo and Pytorch Lightning on 4 V 100 GPUs for MLM and NSP tasks
Worked with a team of lawyers to annotate and clean data for named entity recognition using Prodigy labeling tool
Automated customer review analysis in English, French, Arabic, and Tunisian dialect
Improved model performance by 6% by scraping customer reviews from Google Maps using Selenium and Beautiful Soup
Developed a mask detection model using Efficient Det and Yolo-v 4
Developed an age and gender classification model using Efficient Net architecture

education.school: National Institute of Applied Sciences and Technology (INSAT)
